objective.definition: The compact terminalized continuation memory skill has a deterministic checker, calibrated goldens, runner wiring, and dogfood case coverage.

anti_goals.definition: Do not accept the verifier as valuable from one model narrative alone.
Do not let vocabulary-only artifacts pass without terminal proof, retained trace, evidence gate, and value verification.

terminal_memory_checker_calibrated.freshness_rule: fresh only when calibration and validation were run after the latest checker/case edits

single_llm_truth_acceptance_count.source: deterministic commands plus independent reviewer result when available
single_llm_truth_acceptance_count.freshness_rule: must be read before final claim

allowed_moves: wire runner validation and result hashing
forbidden_moves: claim scored evals ran when only dry-run dispatch ran
claim API-backed review passed if it did not run
weaken existing learning-memory gates to make the new checker pass
approval_gates: human owns whether the compact memory skill becomes policy memory

human_approval.source: user asked to resume after asking how the compact skill value could be verified
